name: Peacock Feather Nath — Pearl & Crystal
description: Gold-tone traditional Nath with vibrant peacock feather design, white pearls and sparkling stone beads. Clip-on style for festive and bridal wear.

name: Ruby Enamel Nath — Blue Stone Accent
description: Elegant Nath with red enamel teardrop, clear centre stone, three blue marquise stones, pearls and crystal ball beads on gold-tone wire.

name: Maharashtrian Nath — Pink & Green Drops
description: Traditional style Nath with square pink stone frame lined with pearls, green teardrop stones, filigree gold bead and pearl cluster.

name: Pink Teardrop & Square Stone Nath
description: Gold-tone piece with pink teardrop stones, square pink centrepiece framed in pearls, crystal ball bead and delicate pearl loops.

name: Peacock Pearl Nath — Classic Festive
description: Peacock eye motif in green and blue with pearl halo, stone-studded gold beads and curved wire — ideal for weddings.

name: Pink Leaf & Pearl Clip Nath
description: Three leaf-shaped pink stones, pearl cluster, crystal encrusted beads and clip-style bottom with tiny pearls. No piercing needed.

name: Red Teardrop Nath — Green Accents
description: Striking red enamel teardrop with clear crystal centre, emerald-green drops, pearls and gold-tone bead — rich ethnic look.

name: Peacock Nath — Pink Gems & Pearls
description: Peacock feather panel with pink teardrop stones, half-circle pearl border, crystal ball beads and pearl hook detail.

name: Square Pink Gem Nath — Pearl Frame
description: Square ruby-pink centre in gold frame with pearl edging, green teardrop stones, rhinestone ball and pearl dangles on wood-tone elegance.

name: Ruby & Aqua Drop Nath
description: Gold-tone Nath with ruby-red teardrop, aqua-green stones, dense pearl arrangement and sparkling spherical bead.

name: Butterfly Blue Stone Nath
description: Butterfly cluster of teal and light blue teardrop gems, two crystal-studded gold beads and twin white pearls — unique daily or festive wear.
